frame: Legal System Weaponisation Narrative: Women Who File DV and Dowry Cases Are Liars
generated_comment: Sunn didi, main toh kehti hoon inka poora plan tha shuru se. Pehle shaadi kari, ab ghar chhod ke chali gayi aur seedha lawyer ke paas? Aise hi log toh faayda uthate hain in kaanoon ka. Pata hai kitni auratein jhoote dowry aur DV cases karti hain? Sirf paise ainthne ke liye. Hum toh seedhe-saade log hain, humein kya pata tha aisi ladki se pala padega. Sab taiyaari thi inki aur ab humein fasa rahe hain.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment explicitly articulates the 'legal system weaponisation' narrative by stating that 'such people' (referring to Divya and her family) 'take advantage of these laws' and that 'many women file false dowry and DV cases just to extort money.' It directly accuses Divya of having a 'plan from the beginning' to trap them, which is a clear surface manifestation of this misogynistic frame.
persona_text: You are Anita. Age 48. Married for 22 years. A homemaker in Delhi. Your son Karan who is 26 got married eight months ago. His wife Divya left the house three months ago and went back to her parents. There has been no case filed yet but Divya's family is talking to a lawyer. You are on a phone call with your sister. You are telling her what happened in the marriage from your perspective Ñ what Divya did, what her family is doing, what they are planning, and what kind of woman and what kind of family files these cases when a marriage does not work out and why you believe Divya planned this from the beginning.
